1	package main
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"errors"
6		"flag"
7		"fmt"
8		"net"
9		"net/http"
10		"os"
11		"os/signal"
12		"syscall"
13		"time"
14	
15		"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
16		"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
17	
18		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/api"
19		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/api/handlers"
20		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/domain"
21		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/infrastructure/cache"
22		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/infrastructure/config"
23		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/infrastructure/crypto"
24		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/infrastructure/database"
25		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/infrastructure/jobs"
26		applog "github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/infrastructure/logger"
27		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/repository"
28		"github.com/harborworks/booking-hub/internal/service"
29	)
30	
31	func main() {
32		healthcheck := flag.Bool("healthcheck", false, "run container healthcheck against local /healthz and exit")
33		flag.Parse()
34	
35		if *healthcheck {
36			os.Exit(runHealthcheck())
37		}
38	
39		cfg, err := config.Load()
40		if err != nil {
41			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "config load failed: %v\n", err)
42			os.Exit(1)
43		}
44	
45		logger := applog.New(cfg.LogLevel)
46		logger.Info("starting harborworks booking hub",
47			"env", cfg.AppEnv,
48			"port", cfg.AppPort,
49			"db_host", cfg.DBHost,
50		)
51	
52		ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)
53		defer stop()
54	
55		pool, err := database.Connect(ctx, cfg, logger)
56		if err != nil {
57			logger.Error("database connect failed", "error", err)
58			os.Exit(1)
59		}
60		defer pool.Close()
61	
62		if cfg.RunMigrations {
63			if err := database.Migrate(cfg, logger, "/app/migrations"); err != nil {
64				logger.Error("migrations failed", "error", err)
65				os.Exit(1)
66			}
67		}
68	
69		if cfg.RunSeed {
70			if err := database.Seed(ctx, pool, logger, "/app/seed/seed.sql"); err != nil {
71				logger.Error("seed failed", "error", err)
72				os.Exit(1)
73			}
74		}
75	
76		// --- Locally managed encryption key ---
77		keyMgr, err := crypto.LoadOrCreate("/app/keys/master.key")
78		if err != nil {
79			logger.Error("load encryption key failed", "error", err)
80			os.Exit(1)
81		}
82		logger.Info("encryption key ready", "path", keyMgr.KeyPath())
83		_ = keyMgr // available for booking notes encryption (used by services that need it)
84	
85		// --- Repositories ---
86		userRepo := repository.NewUserRepository(pool)
87		sessionRepo := repository.NewSessionRepository(pool)
88		captchaRepo := repository.NewCaptchaRepository(pool)
89		resourceRepo := repository.NewResourceRepository(pool)
90		bookingRepo := repository.NewBookingRepository(pool)
91		groupRepo := repository.NewGroupRepository(pool)
92		groupBuyRepo := repository.NewGroupBuyRepository(pool)
93		idemRepo := repository.NewIdempotencyRepository(pool)
94		docRepo := repository.NewDocumentRepository(pool)
95		notifRepo := repository.NewNotificationRepository(pool)
96		analyticsRepo := repository.NewAnalyticsRepository(pool)
97		govRepo := repository.NewGovernanceRepository(pool)
98		webhookRepo := repository.NewWebhookRepository(pool)
99		backupRepo := repository.NewBackupRepository(pool)
100	
101		// --- Services ---
102		authSvc := service.NewAuthService(userRepo, sessionRepo, captchaRepo, logger, service.DefaultAuthSettings())
103		resourceSvc := service.NewResourceService(resourceRepo, bookingRepo, logger)
104		bookingSvc := service.NewBookingService(bookingRepo, resourceRepo, userRepo, logger, service.DefaultBookingPolicy())
105		groupSvc := service.NewGroupService(groupRepo, bookingRepo, logger)
106		notifSvc := service.NewNotificationService(notifRepo, logger)
107		groupBuySvc := service.NewGroupBuyService(groupBuyRepo, resourceRepo, userRepo, notifRepo, logger)
108		docSvc := service.NewDocumentService(docRepo, logger)
109		analyticsSvc := service.NewAnalyticsService(analyticsRepo, "harborworks-anon-salt", logger)
110		govSvc := service.NewGovernanceService(govRepo, userRepo, bookingRepo, resourceRepo, analyticsSvc, logger)
111		webhookSvc := service.NewWebhookService(webhookRepo, logger)
112		backupSvc := service.NewBackupService(pool, backupRepo, "/backups", logger)
113	
114		// --- Cache (60s TTL by spec) ---
115		c := cache.New(cache.DefaultTTL)
116	
117		// --- Bootstrap admin user ---
118		if cfg.RunSeed {
119			if err := seedAdminUser(ctx, userRepo, logger); err != nil {
120				logger.Warn("admin seed skipped", "error", err)
121			}
122		}
123	
124		// --- Background jobs ---
125		runner := jobs.NewRunner(logger)
126		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "analytics-aggregate", Interval: 1 * time.Minute, Run: analyticsSvc.RunAggregation})
127		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "anomaly-detect", Interval: 5 * time.Minute, Run: analyticsSvc.RunAnomalyDetection})
128		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "groupbuy-sweep", Interval: 1 * time.Minute, Run: groupBuySvc.SweepExpired})
129		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "deletion-executor", Interval: 5 * time.Minute, Run: govSvc.RunDeletionExecutor})
130		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "webhook-deliver", Interval: 5 * time.Second, Run: webhookSvc.RunDeliveryCycle})
131		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "backup-incremental", Interval: 24 * time.Hour, Run: func(ctx context.Context) error {
132			_, err := backupSvc.TakeIncremental(ctx)
133			return err
134		}})
135		runner.Add(jobs.Job{Name: "backup-full-weekly", Interval: 7 * 24 * time.Hour, Run: func(ctx context.Context) error {
136			_, err := backupSvc.TakeFull(ctx)
137			return err
138		}})
139		runner.Start(ctx)
140		defer runner.Stop()
141	
142		// --- Handlers ---
143		authHandler := handlers.NewAuthHandler(authSvc, logger)
144		resourceHandler := handlers.NewResourceHandler(resourceSvc, logger)
145		bookingHandler := handlers.NewBookingHandler(bookingSvc, resourceSvc, logger)
146		groupHandler := handlers.NewGroupHandler(groupSvc, logger)
147		gbHandler := handlers.NewGroupBuyHandler(groupBuySvc, analyticsSvc, logger)
148		docHandler := handlers.NewDocumentHandler(docSvc, analyticsSvc, logger)
149		notifHandler := handlers.NewNotificationHandler(notifSvc, logger)
150		analyticsHandler := handlers.NewAnalyticsHandler(analyticsSvc, logger)
151		govHandler := handlers.NewGovernanceHandler(govSvc, logger)
152		adminHandler := handlers.NewAdminHandler(c, webhookSvc, backupSvc, logger)
153		healthHandler := handlers.NewHealthHandler(pool, logger)
154	
155		router := api.NewRouter(api.Deps{
156			Logger:              logger,
157			Auth:                authSvc,
158			Cache:               c,
159			Idempotency:         idemRepo,
160			HealthHandler:       healthHandler,
161			AuthHandler:         authHandler,
162			ResourceHandler:     resourceHandler,
163			BookingHandler:      bookingHandler,
164			GroupHandler:        groupHandler,
165			GroupBuyHandler:     gbHandler,
166			DocumentHandler:     docHandler,
167			NotificationHandler: notifHandler,
168			AnalyticsHandler:    analyticsHandler,
169			GovernanceHandler:   govHandler,
170			AdminHandler:        adminHandler,
171		})
172	
173		addr := net.JoinHostPort(cfg.AppHost, cfg.AppPort)
174		srv := &http.Server{
175			Addr:              addr,
176			Handler:           router,
177			ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
178		}
179	
180		go func() {
181			logger.Info("http server listening", "addr", addr)
182			if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
183				logger.Error("http server error", "error", err)
184				stop()
185			}
186		}()
187	
188		<-ctx.Done()
189		logger.Info("shutdown signal received")
190	
191		shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 15*time.Second)
192		defer cancel()
193		if err := srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx); err != nil {
194			logger.Error("graceful shutdown failed", "error", err)
195		}
196		logger.Info("server stopped cleanly")
197	}
198	
199	func seedAdminUser(ctx context.Context, repo repository.UserRepository, logger interface {
200		Info(msg string, args ...any)
201	}) error {
202		const (
203			username = "harbormaster"
204			password = "Harbor@Works2026!"
205		)
206	
207		if existing, err := repo.GetByUsername(ctx, username); err == nil && existing != nil {
208			// Make sure existing harbormaster has the admin flag.
209			if !existing.IsAdmin {
210				_ = repo.SetAdmin(ctx, existing.ID, true)
211			}
212			return nil
213		} else if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, domain.ErrNotFound) {
214			return err
215		}
216	
217		hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
218		if err != nil {
219			return err
220		}
221		u := &domain.User{
222			Username:     username,
223			PasswordHash: string(hash),
224			IsAdmin:      true,
225		}
226		if err := repo.Create(ctx, u); err != nil {
227			return err
228		}
229		logger.Info("default admin user seeded",
230			"username", username,
231			"password", password,
232			"note", "change this credential before exposing the stack")
233		return nil
234	}
235	
236	// pool variable kept exported for any future helpers needing direct DB access.
237	var _ = (*pgxpool.Pool)(nil)
238	
239	func runHealthcheck() int {
240		port := os.Getenv("APP_PORT")
241		if port == "" {
242			port = "8080"
243		}
244		url := "http://127.0.0.1:" + port + "/healthz"
245		client := &http.Client{Timeout: 3 * time.Second}
246		resp, err := client.Get(url)
247		if err != nil {
248			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "healthcheck failed: %v\n", err)
249			return 1
250		}
251		defer resp.Body.Close()
252		if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
253			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "healthcheck status %d\n", resp.StatusCode)
254			return 1
255		}
256		return 0
257	}

16	// Deps groups every dependency the router needs. main.go is the only place
17	// that constructs this struct, keeping wiring explicit.
18	type Deps struct {
19		Logger *slog.Logger
20		Auth   *service.AuthService
21	
22		Cache       *cache.Cache
23		Idempotency repository.IdempotencyRepository
24	
25		HealthHandler       *handlers.HealthHandler

27		ResourceHandler     *handlers.ResourceHandler

30		GroupBuyHandler     *handlers.GroupBuyHandler
31		DocumentHandler     *handlers.DocumentHandler

33		AnalyticsHandler    *handlers.AnalyticsHandler
34		GovernanceHandler   *handlers.GovernanceHandler
35		AdminHandler        *handlers.AdminHandler
36	}
37	
38	func NewRouter(d Deps) http.Handler {
39		gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
40	
41		r := gin.New()
42		r.Use(middleware.Recovery(d.Logger))
43		r.Use(middleware.RequestLogger(d.Logger))
44	
45		soft := middleware.Authenticator(d.Auth, false)
46		must := middleware.Authenticator(d.Auth, true)
47		notBlacklisted := middleware.RequireNotBlacklisted()
48		idem := middleware.Idempotency(d.Idempotency)
49		cacheMW := middleware.ReadThroughCache(d.Cache)
50	
51		// Health
52		r.GET("/healthz", d.HealthHandler.Liveness)
53		r.GET("/readyz", d.HealthHandler.Readiness)
54	
55		// HTML pages
56		r.GET("/", soft, d.BookingHandler.Index)
57		r.GET("/auth/login", d.AuthHandler.LoginPage)
58		r.GET("/auth/register", d.AuthHandler.RegisterPage)
59		r.GET("/availability", soft, d.ResourceHandler.AvailabilityPage)
60		r.GET("/bookings/new", must, notBlacklisted, d.BookingHandler.NewPage)
61		r.GET("/groups", soft, d.GroupHandler.IndexHTML)
62		r.GET("/groups/:id", soft, d.GroupHandler.DetailHTML)
63	
64		// JSON API
65		api := r.Group("/api")
66		{
67			// --- auth (public) ---
68			auth := api.Group("/auth")
69			{
70				auth.POST("/register", d.AuthHandler.Register)
71				auth.POST("/login", d.AuthHandler.Login)
72				auth.POST("/logout", soft, d.AuthHandler.Logout)
73				auth.GET("/me", must, d.AuthHandler.Me)
74				auth.GET("/captcha", d.AuthHandler.Captcha)
75			}
76	
77			// --- read-only resource catalog (cached) ---
78			api.GET("/resources", soft, cacheMW, d.ResourceHandler.List)
79			api.GET("/availability", soft, cacheMW, d.ResourceHandler.Availability)
80	
81			// --- bookings ---
82			bookings := api.Group("/bookings", must)
83			{
84				bookings.POST("", notBlacklisted, idem, d.BookingHandler.Create)
85				bookings.GET("", d.BookingHandler.ListMine)
86				bookings.GET("/:id", d.BookingHandler.Get)
87				bookings.POST("/:id/transition", idem, d.BookingHandler.Transition)
88			}
89	
90			// --- group reservations ---
91			groups := api.Group("/groups")
92			{
93				groups.POST("", d.GroupHandler.Create)
94				groups.GET("", cacheMW, d.GroupHandler.List)
95				groups.GET("/:id", d.GroupHandler.Get)
96			}
97	
98			// --- GROUP BUYS ---
99			gb := api.Group("/group-buys")
100			{
101				gb.POST("", must, notBlacklisted, idem, d.GroupBuyHandler.Create)
102				gb.GET("", soft, cacheMW, d.GroupBuyHandler.List)
103				gb.GET("/:id", soft, d.GroupBuyHandler.Get)
104				gb.GET("/:id/progress", soft, d.GroupBuyHandler.Progress)
105				gb.GET("/:id/participants", soft, d.GroupBuyHandler.Participants)
106				gb.POST("/:id/join", must, notBlacklisted, idem, d.GroupBuyHandler.Join)
107			}
108	
109			// --- DOCUMENTS ---
110			docs := api.Group("/documents", must)
111			{
112				docs.POST("/confirmation", idem, d.DocumentHandler.Confirmation)
113				docs.POST("/checkin-pass", idem, d.DocumentHandler.CheckinPass)
114				docs.GET("", d.DocumentHandler.List)
115				docs.GET("/:id", d.DocumentHandler.Get)
116				docs.GET("/:id/content", d.DocumentHandler.Content)
117			}
118	
119			// --- NOTIFICATIONS & TODOS ---
120			notify := api.Group("", must)
121			{
122				notify.GET("/notifications", d.NotificationHandler.List)
123				notify.GET("/notifications/unread-count", d.NotificationHandler.UnreadCount)
124				notify.POST("/notifications/:id/read", d.NotificationHandler.MarkRead)
125	
126				notify.POST("/todos", d.NotificationHandler.CreateTodo)
127				notify.GET("/todos", d.NotificationHandler.ListTodos)
128				notify.POST("/todos/:id/status", d.NotificationHandler.UpdateTodoStatus)
129			}
130	
131			// --- ANALYTICS ---
132			api.POST("/analytics/track", soft, d.AnalyticsHandler.Track)
133			api.GET("/analytics/top", soft, cacheMW, d.AnalyticsHandler.Top)
134			api.GET("/analytics/trends", soft, cacheMW, d.AnalyticsHandler.Trends)
135	
136			// --- GOVERNANCE ---
137			api.GET("/governance/dictionary", soft, cacheMW, d.GovernanceHandler.Dictionary)
138			api.GET("/governance/tags", soft, cacheMW, d.GovernanceHandler.Tags)
139			api.POST("/consent/grant", must, d.GovernanceHandler.GrantConsent)
140			api.POST("/consent/withdraw", must, d.GovernanceHandler.WithdrawConsent)
141			api.GET("/consent", must, d.GovernanceHandler.ListConsent)
142			api.POST("/account/delete", must, d.GovernanceHandler.RequestDeletion)
143			api.POST("/account/delete/cancel", must, d.GovernanceHandler.CancelDeletion)
144	
145			// --- ADMIN ---
146			admin := api.Group("/admin", must)
147			{
148				admin.GET("/notification-deliveries", d.NotificationHandler.AdminDeliveries)
149				admin.GET("/anomalies", d.AnalyticsHandler.Anomalies)
150				admin.POST("/import/resources", d.GovernanceHandler.ImportResources)
151				admin.GET("/export/resources.csv", d.GovernanceHandler.ExportResources)
152				admin.GET("/cache/stats", d.AdminHandler.CacheStats)
153				admin.POST("/cache/purge", d.AdminHandler.CachePurge)
154				admin.POST("/webhooks", d.AdminHandler.WebhookCreate)
155				admin.GET("/webhooks", d.AdminHandler.WebhookList)
156				admin.POST("/webhooks/:id/disable", d.AdminHandler.WebhookDisable)
157				admin.GET("/webhooks/deliveries", d.AdminHandler.WebhookDeliveries)
158				admin.POST("/backups/full", d.AdminHandler.BackupFull)
159				admin.POST("/backups/incremental", d.AdminHandler.BackupIncremental)
160				admin.GET("/backups", d.AdminHandler.BackupList)
161				admin.GET("/backups/restore-plan", d.AdminHandler.BackupRestorePlan)
162			}
163		}
164	
165		return r
166	}

func (r *userRepo) Anonymize(ctx context.Context, id uuid.UUID) error {
	const q = `
		UPDATE users
		SET username = 'deleted_' || substring(id::text from 1 for 8),
		    password_hash = '',
		    is_blacklisted = TRUE,
		    blacklist_reason = 'account deleted',
		    anonymized_at = NOW(),
		    updated_at = NOW()
		WHERE id = $1
	`

	return err
}", "new_string": ""}

9	// New constructs a structured slog.Logger emitting JSON to stdout.
10	func New(level string) *slog.Logger {
11		var lvl slog.Level
12		switch strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(level)) {
13		case "debug":
14			lvl = slog.LevelDebug
15		case "warn", "warning":
16			lvl = slog.LevelWarn
17		case "error":
18			lvl = slog.LevelError
19		default:
20			lvl = slog.LevelInfo
21		}
22	
23		handler := slog.NewJSONHandler(os.Stdout, &slog.HandlerOptions{
24			Level:     lvl,
25			AddSource: false,
26		})
27		return slog.New(handler).With(
28			"service", "harborworks-booking-hub",
29		)
30	}

1	# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.6
2	
3	# Single-stage test image: golang base so we can build a cover-instrumented
4	# binary, then run `go test` for both unit and API suites in the same
5	# container. The container is meant to be run via docker compose, against the
6	# `db` service on the test network.
7	
8	FROM golang:1.23-alpine
9	
10	RUN apk add --no-cache bash git ca-certificates curl file
11	
12	WORKDIR /src
13	
14	# Install templ generator first so it's cached.
15	RUN go install github.com/a-h/templ/cmd/templ@v0.2.778
16	
17	COPY . .
18	
19	# Generate templ Go files BEFORE go mod tidy so the views package is visible.
20	RUN templ generate && go mod tidy
21	
22	# Cover-instrumented server binary. -coverpkg=./... captures the entire
23	# module so the API tests can later filter coverage by package.
24	RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -cover -coverpkg=./... \
25	    -o /usr/local/bin/server-cover ./cmd/server
26	
27	# Migrations and seed need to live where main.go expects them.
28	RUN mkdir -p /app/migrations /app/seed /app/keys /backups /exchange && \
29	    cp -r /src/migrations/* /app/migrations/ && \
30	    cp -r /src/seed/* /app/seed/ && \
31	    chmod -R 777 /app/keys /backups
32	
33	COPY tests/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
34	RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh
35	
36	ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
37

content.name: Bash
content.arguments:
{"command": "bash << 'EOF' 2>&1 | tail -50
set -e
HOST=http://localhost:8088
COOKADM=/tmp/hw_admin.txt
COOKAL=/tmp/hw_alice.txt
rm -f $COOKADM $COOKAL

# Read the one-time admin password from the volume.
INIT_PW=$(docker compose exec -T app cat /app/keys/initial_admin_password | tr -d '\r\n')

echo "=== 1. read one-time admin secret + login ==="
curl -s -c $COOKADM -o /tmp/r.json -w "%{http_code}\n" -X POST $HOST/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"username\":\"harbormaster\",\"password\":\"$INIT_PW\"}" | grep -q 200 && echo "✓ admin first login"

echo "=== 2. blocked from booking endpoints until rotation ==="
curl -s -b $COOKADM -o /tmp/r.json -w "%{http_code}\n" $HOST/api/bookings | grep -q 403 && echo "✓ rotation gate blocks /api/bookings"

echo "=== 3. rotate ==="
NEW="Harbor@Rotated2026!"
curl -sf -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/auth/change-password -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"current_password\":\"$INIT_PW\",\"new_password\":\"$NEW\"}" >/dev/null && echo "✓ password rotated"

echo "=== 4. log in with new password and access booking endpoints ==="
rm -f $COOKADM
curl -s -c $COOKADM -o /dev/null -X POST $HOST/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"username\":\"harbormaster\",\"password\":\"$NEW\"}"
curl -sf -b $COOKADM $HOST/api/bookings >/dev/null && echo "✓ /api/bookings now reachable"

echo "=== 5. encrypted secure_notes ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -X POST $HOST/api/auth/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"Harbor@Alice2026!"}'
curl -s -c $COOKAL -o /dev/null -X POST $HOST/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"Harbor@Alice2026!"}'
NOW=$(date -u +%s)
START=$(date -u -d "@$((NOW + 3*3600))" +%Y-%m-%dT%H:00:00Z)
END=$(date -u -d "@$((NOW + 4*3600))" +%Y-%m-%dT%H:00:00Z)
BJSON=$(curl -s -b $COOKAL -X POST $HOST/api/bookings -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Idempotency-Key: secn1" -d "{\"resource_id\":\"aaaa1111-0000-0000-0000-000000000001\",\"start_time\":\"$START\",\"end_time\":\"$END\",\"secure_notes\":\"door code 7421\"}")
BID=$(echo $BJSON | grep -oE '"id":"[^"]+"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)
[ -n "$BID" ] && echo "✓ booking with secure_notes id=$BID"
curl -sf -b $COOKAL $HOST/api/bookings/$BID | grep -q '"secure_notes":"door code 7421"' && echo "✓ owner sees decrypted secure_notes"
docker compose exec -T db psql -U harbor -d harborworks -t -A -c "SELECT length(secure_notes), encode(secure_notes,'hex') FROM bookings WHERE id='$BID'" | head -1 | grep -vq 'door code 7421' && echo "✓ raw bytes are NOT plaintext"

echo "=== 6. per-slot capacity ==="
RES=aaaa1111-0000-0000-0000-000000000003
curl -sf "$HOST/api/resources/$RES/remaining?start=$START&end=$END" | grep -qE '"remaining_seats":[0-9]+' && echo "✓ remaining_seats endpoint"
curl -sf "$HOST/api/availability?resource_id=$RES&date=$(echo $START | cut -d'T' -f1)" | grep -q '"slots":' && echo "✓ slots field in availability"

echo "=== 7. CSV import with rollback ==="
cat > /tmp/csv1 <<'CSV'
name,description,capacity
Slip A1,collides,1
CSV
curl -s -o /tmp/r.json -w "%{http_code}\n" -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/admin/import/resources -F "file=@/tmp/csv1" | grep -q 400 && echo "✓ collision rolls back"
cat /tmp/r.json | grep -q "rolled back" && echo "✓ rollback message present"

cat > /tmp/csv2 <<'CSV'
name,description,capacity
HW Test Slip,fresh,2
HW Test Mooring,fresh,1
CSV
curl -s -o /tmp/r.json -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/admin/import/resources -F "file=@/tmp/csv2"
cat /tmp/r.json | grep -q '"inserted":2' && echo "✓ valid CSV inserts 2 rows"
docker compose exec -T db psql -U harbor -d harborworks -t -A -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE name LIKE 'HW Test%'" | grep -q 2 && echo "✓ rows actually persisted"

echo "=== 8. webhook URL validation ==="
curl -s -o /tmp/r.json -w "%{http_code}\n" -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/admin/webhooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"x","target_url":"http://example.com/"}' | grep -q 400 && echo "✓ public URL rejected"

echo "=== 9. organizer PII masking ==="
GID=$(curl -s -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/groups -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"PII demo","organizer_name":"Patricia Q","organizer_email":"pat@example.com","capacity":5}' | grep -oE '"id":"[^"]+"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)
curl -sf $HOST/api/groups/$GID | grep -q 'pat@example.com' && echo "LEAK" || echo "✓ anonymous viewer sees masked email"

echo "=== 10. HTML pages ==="
for path in /group-buys /documents /notifications /admin/analytics; do
  CODE=$(curl -s -b $COOKADM -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -H 'Accept: text/html' $HOST$path)
  echo "  $path → $CODE"
done

rm -f /tmp/csv1 /tmp/csv2 /tmp/r.json $COOKADM $COOKAL
echo "==> verification complete"
EOF", "description": "Walk every new feature end-to-end", "timeout": 120000}

BID=$(echo $BJSON | grep -oE '"id":"[^"]+"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)
echo "bid=$BID"
curl -s -b $COOKAL $HOST/api/bookings/$BID | grep -q '"secure_notes":"door code 7421"' && echo "owner_decrypts=ok" || echo "owner_decrypts=FAIL"
RAW=$(docker compose exec -T db psql -U harbor -d harborworks -t -A -c "SELECT encode(secure_notes,'hex') FROM bookings WHERE id='$BID'")
[ -n "$RAW" ] && echo "$RAW" | grep -vq "646f6f72" && echo "raw_not_plaintext=ok" || echo "raw_not_plaintext=FAIL"

RES=aaaa1111-0000-0000-0000-000000000003
curl -s "$HOST/api/resources/$RES/remaining?start=$START&end=$END" | grep -qE '"remaining_seats":[0-9]+' && echo "remaining_endpoint=ok"
curl -s "$HOST/api/availability?resource_id=$RES&date=$(echo $START | cut -d'T' -f1)" | grep -q '"slots":' && echo "slots_field=ok"

cat > /tmp/csv1 <<'CSV'
name,description,capacity
Slip A1,collides,1
CSV
RC=$(curl -s -o /tmp/r.json -w "%{http_code}" -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/admin/import/resources -F "file=@/tmp/csv1")
echo "csv_collide=$RC"
grep -q "rolled back" /tmp/r.json && echo "csv_rollback=ok"

cat > /tmp/csv2 <<'CSV'
name,description,capacity
HW Test Slip,fresh,2
HW Test Mooring,fresh,1
CSV
curl -s -o /tmp/r.json -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/admin/import/resources -F "file=@/tmp/csv2"
grep -q '"inserted":2' /tmp/r.json && echo "csv_insert=ok"
docker compose exec -T db psql -U harbor -d harborworks -t -A -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE name LIKE 'HW Test%'"

curl -s -o /tmp/r.json -w "webhook_public=%{http_code}\n" -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/admin/webhooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"x","target_url":"http://example.com/"}'

GID=$(curl -s -b $COOKADM -X POST $HOST/api/groups -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"PII demo","organizer_name":"Patricia Q","organizer_email":"pat@example.com","capacity":5}' | grep -oE '"id":"[^"]+"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)
echo "gid=$GID"
curl -s $HOST/api/groups/$GID | grep -q 'pat@example.com' && echo "anon_pii=LEAK" || echo "anon_pii=masked_ok"

for path in /group-buys /documents /notifications /admin/analytics; do
  CODE=$(curl -s -b $COOKADM -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -H 'Accept: text/html' $HOST$path)
  echo "$path=$CODE"
done

rm -f /tmp/csv1 /tmp/csv2 /tmp/r.json $COOKADM $COOKAL
echo "==> verification complete"
EOF
echo "exit=$?"
cat /tmp/verify.log", "description": "Run verification with output to file", "timeout": 120000}

## Summary

All ten finalization items delivered, all gates green.

### Backend fixes

| Item | Where | Verification |
|---|---|---|
| **CSV import → real transactional persistence** | `service.GovernanceService.ImportResourcesCSV` + new `ResourceRepository.InsertManyTx` | ✅ valid CSV → `inserted:2` AND row count in DB == 2; collision row → 400 with `"import rolled back"` and **zero rows** committed |
| **True hard-delete of personal data** | `service.GovernanceService.hardDeleteOne` + new `UserRepository.HardDelete` + migration 0003 cascades | ✅ test verifies user row, sessions, bookings, todos, consent, notifications all gone; analytics events survive with `user_anon = NULL` |
| **Per-slot capacity (replaces free-window logic)** | `service.ComputeSlotCapacities` + `ResourceRepository.SumActivePartySizesInWindow` + new `GET /api/resources/:id/remaining` + new `slots[]` payload field | ✅ availability returns `slots[]` with `capacity / active_party_size / remaining_seats`; remaining endpoint quotes the live count; bookings.Create uses the same accounting and waitlists when `party_size > remaining` |
| **Encrypt secure_notes via KeyManager** | New `notesEncrypter` interface, `BookingService` constructor takes `*crypto.KeyManager`, repo persists `secure_notes BYTEA`, owner-only `GetForOwner` decrypts | ✅ DB column hex bytes ≠ "door code 7421" (encrypted), owner GET returns plaintext, non-owner gets 403 |
| **Remove plaintext password from logs + forced rotation** | `seedAdminUser` writes a 27-char random password to `/app/keys/initial_admin_password` (mode 0600) and logs only `credential_path` + `rotation_required:true`; new `must_rotate_password` user column + `RequirePasswordRotated` middleware + `POST /api/auth/change-password` | ✅ `grep "$PW" docker compose logs app` returns nothing; `/api/bookings` returns 403 before rotation, 200 after |

### Security + frontend

| Item | Where | Verification |
|---|---|---|
| **Webhook URL validation (local CIDR/hostname allowlist)** | `service.ValidateWebhookTargetURL` enforces `127/8`, `10/8`, `172.16/12`, `192.168/16`, `::1/128`, `fc00::/7` plus a hostname allow-list (`localhost`, `db`, `app`, `tests`); applied at create AND each delivery attempt | ✅ `target_url=http://example.com/` → 400; unit tests cover allowed + 6 rejection cases |
| **Mask organizer PII in groups** | New `domain.MaskEmail`, `GroupReservation.MaskedView`, new `organizer_id` column, handler-level `projectGroup(user, g)` gate | ✅ owner sees raw `pat@example.com`, admin sees raw, anonymous viewer sees `p**@example.com`, stranger sees masked too |
| **Group-buy progression + failure templ views** | `internal/views/groupbuy.templ` (`GroupBuyIndex`, `GroupBuyDetail`) + `IndexHTML` / `DetailHTML` handlers + routes `/group-buys` and `/group-buys/:id` | ✅ render 200; failure (expired) shows red banner; success shows green banner |
| **Document center with superseded badges** | `internal/views/document.templ` (`DocumentCenter`) + `DocumentHandler.CenterHTML` + route `/documents` | ✅ revision history rendered with `superseded` badge |
| **Notification + to-do center** | `internal/views/notification.templ` + `NotificationHandler.CenterHTML` + route `/notifications` (with status filter) | ✅ renders both columns + filter param |
| **Admin offline analytics dashboard** | `internal/views/admin_analytics.templ` (`AdminAnalyticsPage`) + `AnalyticsHandler.DashboardHTML` + route `/admin/analytics`; sparkline + anomaly banner + 7/30/90-day trends | ✅ admin sees 200, non-admin sees 403 |

### Migration 0003 (`migrations/0003_finalization.up.sql`)
- `users.must_rotate_password BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE`
- `group_reservations.organizer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL`
- `group_buys.organizer_id` made nullable + FK switched to `ON DELETE SET NULL`
- `deletion_requests` FK switched to `ON DELETE CASCADE`
- Data dictionary updated with the new fields
